deployed.note: subgroup |G|<=sqrt(p)+1 PROVED; deployed arc incomplete; soft-B still open

impact_on_program.closed: E_+=p^{-1} sum|G|^4; subgroup |G|<=sqrt(p)+1; deployed arc flagged incomplete
impact_on_program.wall: incomplete GP G-bound and/or soft-B max|S|<=B_*

OPEN.name: OPEN_incomplete_GP_G_and_soft_B
OPEN.statement: Prove sharp |G| for incomplete GP prefixes (deployed n'), and/or max|S|<=B_*~393172 for free-1 highs at deployed (n',e).

deployed_incomplete.name: deployed_arc_is_incomplete_GP
proof: MCA domain = full mu_n; residual arc uses first n' indices only.
deployed_incomplete.statement: Deployed pure-untyped window is a length-n'=1183520 prefix of the cyclic subgroup of n=2097152=2^21-th roots in F_p (n | p-1). Subgroup |G|<=sqrt(p)+1 applies to the full order-n (or order-t) subgroup, not automatically to the incomplete prefix of length n'.

energy_LinfL2.name: energy_Linf_L2_bound
energy_LinfL2.statement: E_+(S) <= t^2 (t^2 + (p-t)^2) / p for |S|=t, via max_{a!=0}|G|<=sqrt(p t - t^2).

energy_id.name: additive_energy_via_G4
proof: Plancherel: sum_s |r|^2 = p^{-1} sum_alpha |hat r|^2 = p^{-1} sum |G|^4.
energy_id.statement: For any S subset F_p: sum_s r(s)^2 = p^{-1} sum_alpha |G(alpha)|^4 with r(s)=|S cap (s-S)| (ordered) and G= Fourier of 1_S.

subgroup_G.name: multiplicative_subgroup_G_le_sqrtp_plus_1
proof: sum_{x in H} psi(a x) = (t/(p-1)) sum_{chi|H=1} chi(a)^{-1} tau(chi).
tau(triv)=-1; |tau(nontriv)|=sqrt(p); # of chi with chi|H=1 is (p-1)/t.
subgroup_G.statement: If H <= F_p^* has order t|(p-1) and a!=0, then |sum_{x in H} psi(a x)| <= sqrt(p) + t/(p-1) <= sqrt(p)+1.

subgroup_energy.name: subgroup_energy_bound
subgroup_energy.statement: For multiplicative subgroup H of order t: E_+(H) <= t^4/p + (sqrt(p)+1)^4.

deployed.note: subgroup |G|<=sqrt(p)+1 PROVED; deployed arc incomplete; soft-B still open
